title: Trump says he's postponing 'scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' at Middle East leaders' request
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran are in a stalemate centered on the Strait of Hormuz, the global oil pathway whose closure due to the war has caused an energy supply shock.
